claims.claim: Minime ESN has source-prepared dynamic-noise and viscous-rho review hooks that are decoupled from live ESN::step.
dynamic_noise_pressure_room_review_v1 at pressure_risk 0.35 and density_gradient 0.2 preserves a navigable slope without status collapse.
calculate_dynamic_noise must default safely for non-finite inputs and avoid NaN propagation.
Mapping viscous rho targets into live ESN state would alter runtime reservoir behavior.
evidence: authority_gate:Tier 5 Mike/operator approval required before live ESN rho/noise/step behavior changes
